questions.question: 506 leads unassigned + SynthFlow not connected. Leo WO in flight. What's your priority signal?

options.A: SynthFlow + GHL wiring is #1 — block everything else until done
options.B: Keep moving but don't block other sprints
options.C: Manually assign 506 leads to Bailey/Keith first, then wire SynthFlow
options.D: Hold — review pipeline quality before auto-assigning

questions.rationale: Lead Processing at 22% is the biggest autonomy gap. Every day of delay = cold leads losing 80% conversion probability.
questions.advaita_alignment: Lead Processing 22% → 70%+ is the single biggest Advaita unlock

questions.question: IC 'Investor Headlines' adset at $76/lead (target $45). New community-hub creative ready. Call?

options.A: Pause Investor Headlines immediately — stop the bleeding now
options.B: Run both in parallel 48hrs then decide
options.C: Kill IC ads entirely until creative is proven
options.D: Reduce IC budget 50% while testing new creative

questions.rationale: Leo WO ts 1777986496 already sets up parallel test. Pausing immediately risks losing momentum; 48hr data tells us if new creative works.
questions.advaita_alignment: Lead Acquisition — IC CPL must hit <$50 to scale funnel

questions.question: 5.2 weeks zero-deal runway. What's the #1 deal-acceleration move this week?

options.A: Daily pipeline review — Bailey/Keith accountability on Discovery Day conversions
options.B: SynthFlow speed-to-lead — first call within 60 seconds of opt-in
options.C: Re-engage 21 Financial Review + 12 Biz Plan near-close leads

questions.rationale: 5.2 weeks is critical. Each track hits a different bottleneck: speed-to-lead = top funnel, re-engage = near-close, accountability = close rate.
questions.advaita_alignment: Financial Control — runway survival requires pipeline velocity now
